subcodes.first_line: O Dhabíh! Thou hast written concerning Shah-Mirza. This matter is known to that honored one, for from the Divine Court the decree hath [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ذبیح از شاه میرزا نوشته بودی اینفقره بر آنجناب معلوم است که از شطر قدم حکم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @contention and conflict, @justice and wrath of God, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
